meaning: [螟江n.[逕ｨ菴懷黒]{遉ｾ}遨ｺ髣ｴ蜈ｳ邉ｻ蟄ｦ
examples: Proxemics - the use of interpersonal space.
This paper studies proxemics in terms of the contrast between the eastern and western culture, and points out functions of space language in communication.
In this paper, the author sets forth five aspects of non-verbal means of communication including kinetics, proxemics, visual behavior, facial expression, and para-language.
